CustomField.description: We are populating this field value from different places- 1. When creating utilization, If utilization type = "True Up Gross" then we are populating this field value with true. 2. On Invoice record, we are copying value from utilization field to respective "True_Up_Gross__c" invoice field in insert and update case 3. When creating utilization then populating this field value if type = true up via utilization staging. 4. When Creating a utilization of type = "Assumed/Estimated" then setting up this value to false.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: We populate this field from multiple sources: For 'True Up Gross' utilization types, we set it to 'true' during creation. In Invoices, we copy it from utilization to 'True_Up_Gross__c' during insert/update. Utilization staging fills it for 'true up' types. 'Assumed/Estimated' utilizations set it to 'false'.
CustomField.label: _True Up
